bullets.body: **Generally available na ang Microsoft Agent 365 mula Mayo 1 — $15/user/buwan, kasama sa Microsoft 365 E7 SKU; binuo sa tatlong haligi (observe / govern / secure); pinapayagan ng tools management ang AI admins na sentralisadong tingnan + allow/block ang Microsoft MCP servers sa tenant; deeply integrated sa Entra ID + Purview + Intune + Defender; mula sa Hunyo 2026 ay magdadagdag ang Defender ng asset-context mapping kada agent (devices, MCP servers, identities, cloud resources); commercial + education tenants ay nag-a-activate mula sa M365 admin center kaagad; GCC/GCC High late 2026, DoD early 2027** — Unang mainstream-priced enterprise agent control plane na naka-wire sa existing M365 admin surface. Ang MCP-server allow/block primitive ang nawawalang enterprise gate laban sa April 28 ATT&CK v19 named technique na "MCP server compromise".

sections.category: AI Security > CVE / KEV / Threat Intelligence (CVSS ≥ 8.0)

bullets.body: **CISA KEV May 1 — idinagdag ang CVE-2026-31431 "Copy Fail" Linux kernel local privilege escalation; CVSS 7.8 pero mandatory sa BOD-22-01; federal remediation deadline May 15; algif_aead AF_ALG socket + splice() interaction na nagbibigay ng 4-byte write sa kernel page cache ng anumang readable file, naco-corrupt ang in-memory representation ng /usr/bin/su para makakuha ng root nang hindi binabago ang on-disk binary; apektado ang halos lahat ng Linux distro mula 2017 (Ubuntu 24.04 LTS, Amazon Linux 2023, RHEL 10.1, SUSE 16, Debian, Fedora, Arch); maraming in-the-wild attacks laban sa US think tanks + European manufacturing + cloud service providers; chains kasama ang web-app/VPN-appliance RCE para sa initial foothold** — Largest single-vendor KEV-affected install base ng 2026; ang 14-day federal deadline ang second-tightest ng taon.

citations.label: CISA - Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog (May 1)

bullets.body: **CVE-2026-31431 cross-vendor disclosure — naglathala ang Microsoft Security Blog ng full chain analysis ("Copy Fail" → root via /usr/bin/su page-cache corruption); naglathala ang Wiz ng universal-Linux LPE deep-dive; CERT-EU advisory 2026-005; live na lahat ng Tenable + SUSE + AWS + Canadian Cyber Centre advisories simula May 1** — Cross-vendor disclosure alignment; pinakamalinis na writeups ang Microsoft + Wiz.
